name: N-able N-sight RMM and MSP Platform REST API
what_it_does: N-able N-sight RMM and MSP platform REST API for managed service providers to remotely monitor and manage client endpoints, servers, network devices, and cloud services — enabling automated device monitoring, patch management, remote access, backup management, and MSP service delivery through N-able's cloud-based remote monitoring and management platform. Enables AI agents to manage device monitoring for endpoint and server health monitoring automation, handle patch management for OS and application patching automation, access remote desktop for endpoint support and troubleshooting automation, retrieve alerts for device health and threshold alert management automation, manage backup management for integrated backup job monitoring automation, handle antivirus for endpoint security status management automation, access network discovery for client network topology discovery automation, retrieve reporting for MSP client SLA and health reporting automation, manage scripting for automated maintenance and remediation script deployment automation, and integrate N-able with PSA tools for ConnectWise and Autotask ticketing automation.
use_cases: Automating endpoint patch deployment and compliance for MSP managed services automation agents
Monitoring client device health and responding to alerts for MSP NOC automation agents
Managing multi-tenant device inventory and health dashboards for MSP operations automation agents
Triggering automated remediation scripts for common endpoint issues for MSP automation agents
not_for: Enterprise direct IT management (N-able is MSP-channel focused, not direct enterprise software)
Security operations center (N-able is RMM, not SIEM/SOAR for security incident response)
Cloud infrastructure management (N-able monitors endpoints/servers, not AWS/Azure cloud services directly)
best_when: A managed service provider wanting AI agents to automate endpoint monitoring, patch management, and client device management across their book of business through N-able's cloud RMM platform purpose-built for MSPs.
avoid_when: MSP PARTNER REQUIRED: N-able N-sight is sold exclusively through MSP partners; automated direct access assumption creates partner_required; automated must be N-able MSP partner. AGENT ENROLLMENT REQUIRED: Client device management requires N-able agent deployment; automated agentless assumption creates device_not_monitored without agent; automated must automate agent deployment to client endpoints. API IS N-SIGHT SPECIFIC: N-able has separate products (N-sight, N-central) with different APIs; automated product-agnostic assumption creates endpoint_mismatch between N-sight and N-central API calls; automated must use API matching the N-able product. SCRIPTING REQUIRES PRE-APPROVAL: Automated scripts must be reviewed and approved in N-able platform before execution; automated unapproved execution assumption creates blocked_script for scripts not pre-approved; automated must manage script approval lifecycle.

auth.notes: N-able uses API key for N-sight RMM REST API. REST API with JSON/XML. Burlington, MA HQ. Founded 1999 as SolarWinds MSP division, spun off as N-able 2021. NYSE:NABL. Products: N-sight (SMB RMM), N-central (enterprise RMM), Cove (backup), Passportal (password management), EDR. 25,000+ MSP partners. Competes with Datto, Kaseya, and NinjaRMM for MSP remote monitoring and management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial for MSPs; production requires N-able partner enrollment
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-device monthly pricing; N-sight and N-central priced separately; partner tier pricing
pricing.notes: Burlington MA. NYSE:NABL. Per-device monthly. 25,000+ MSP partners. Spun from SolarWinds 2021.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; monitoring and management APIs throttled per partner tier

known_agent_gotchas: API USES XML AND JSON: N-sight API supports both XML and JSON; automated JSON-only assumption creates format_error for legacy XML-required endpoints; automated must check endpoint documentation for supported format

CLIENT SITE HIERARCHY: N-able organizes devices under client/site hierarchy; automated flat-device assumption creates missing_device for operations requiring client and site context; automated must include client/site context in API calls

PATCH APPROVAL WORKFLOW: Patches go through approval before deployment; automated immediate-deployment assumption creates patch_not_deployed for unapproved patches; automated must manage patch approval state before deployment

ALERT ACKNOWLEDGMENT AFFECTS STATUS: Unacknowledged alerts persist in dashboard; automated auto-close assumption creates dashboard_clutter without proper alert acknowledgment workflow; automated must acknowledge resolved alerts

REPORT DATA HAS TIME ZONE CONTEXT: N-able reports are time-zone sensitive; automated UTC assumption creates off-by-one date errors for MSPs in non-UTC time zones; automated must specify correct time zone for report queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: MSP RMM. SOC2, HIPAA. API key. US/EU. Client endpoint and network monitoring data.

security_score_components.security_notes: MSP monitoring. SOC2, HIPAA. API key. US/EU. Client device and network management data.
